title: Alien: Romulus (2024) - Box Office and Financial Information
text: This financial report documents the theatrical performance of the 2024 science fiction horror film. The movie earned approximately $105.3 million domestically and $245.6 million internationally, totaling $350.9 million worldwide against an $80 million production budget. The film opened strongly with "a $42 million opening weekend" across 3,885 theaters. However, it experienced steep drops in subsequent weeks, declining 61% in its second weekend. The movie maintained a 2.51 "legs" multiplier, indicating moderate audience retention through its theatrical run. The film was released domestically on August 16, 2024, by 20th Century Studios, with international releases beginning two days earlier in select markets. It received an R rating for violent content and language. The production was filmed in Budapest, Hungary, and features a 119-minute runtime. Physical media sales generated minimal additional revenue, with approximately $2.1 million in Blu-ray sales following its October 15, 2024 home video release through Walt Disney Home Entertainment.
